'''sashate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:idlingly|idlingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-sh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:idlingly|idlingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sashate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:sashate|sashate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sashatesher|sashatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sashatesherĂ«m|sashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sashatero|sashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sashateshĂ«|sashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sashateshĂ«m|sashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisashatero|gokisashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisashateshĂ«|gokisashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisashateshĂ«m|gokisashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosashankerom|gosashankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosashankeshĂ«|gosashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosashankeshĂ«m|gosashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosashankeya|gosashankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sashaterom|sashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sashatemu|sashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sashateya|sashateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisashaterom|gokisashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisashatemu|gokisashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisashateya|gokisashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:sashashate|sashashate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sashashatesher|sashashatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sashashatesherĂ«m|sashashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sashashatero|sashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sashashateshĂ«|sashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sashashateshĂ«m|sashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisashashatero|gokisashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisashashateshĂ«|gokisashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisashashateshĂ«m|gokisashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosashashankerom|gosashashankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosashashankeshĂ«|gosashashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosashashankeshĂ«m|gosashashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosashashankeya|gosashashankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sashashaterom|sashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sashashatemu|sashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sashashateya|sashashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisashashaterom|gokisashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisashashatemu|gokisashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisashashateya|gokisashashateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:sĂŠshĂŠte|sĂŠshĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sĂŠshĂŠtesher|sĂŠshĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m|sĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠshĂŠtero|sĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|sĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|sĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠshĂŠtero|gokisĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|gokisĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|gokisĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosĂŠshĂŠnkerom|gosĂŠshĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«|gosĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gosĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosĂŠshĂŠnkeya|gosĂŠshĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠshĂŠterom|sĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠshĂŠtemu|sĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sĂŠshĂŠteya|sĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠshĂŠterom|gokisĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠshĂŠtemu|gokisĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisĂŠshĂŠteya|gokisĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:safshafte|safshafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:safshaftesher|safshaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safshaftesherĂ«m|safshaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safshaftero|safshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:safshafteshĂ«|safshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safshafteshĂ«m|safshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafshaftero|gokisafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisafshafteshĂ«|gokisafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafshafteshĂ«m|gokisafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosafshafnkerom|gosafshafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosafshafnkeshĂ«|gosafshafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosafshafnkeshĂ«m|gosafshafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosafshafnkeya|gosafshafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safshafterom|safshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safshaftemu|safshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:safshafteya|safshafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafshafterom|gokisafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafshaftemu|gokisafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisafshafteya|gokisafshafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
